SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, September 1,2016:
Triant Tom Varellas, Appellant/Defendant was not present.
Rene Hinojosa, Respondent/Plaintiff was present and in Propria Persona.

This cause comes on calendar as assigned by Department 206 for trial de novo. Plaintiff/Respondent Rene Hinojosa was sworn in and testifies on his own behalf.

Plaintiff/Respondent Rene Hinojosa's Exhibit No.1 consists of Pages 1 to 6 of Weekly Earnings and Letter dated July 13, 2016 are introduced.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Plaitiff/Respondent Rene Hinojose's Exhibit No.1 is retained by the court.

Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze. Clerk: P. Natt. matter not reported (D525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-05-2016 Judgment Entered
